mapper.select: SELECT b.b_no, b.b_title, b.b_write, b.b_memo, b.b_date, b.m_no, m.m_image, b.b_image FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.m_no = m.m_no ORDER BY b.b_no DESC
SELECT b.b_no, b.b_title, b.b_write, b.b_memo, b.b_date, b.m_no, m.m_image, b.b_image FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.m_no = m.m_no WHERE b.b_no = #{b_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( b_no, b_title, b_write, b_memo, b_date, m_no, b_image ) VALUES ( seq_board.NEXTVAL, #{b_title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{b_write, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{b_memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{m_no, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{b_image, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
